ddls:
CREATE TABLE "stock_prices" (
  "price_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each price record */,
  "symbol_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the stock symbol */,
  "date" TEXT /* Date of the price data */,
  "open_price" REAL /* Opening price of the stock */,
  "high_price" REAL /* Highest price of the stock on the given date */,
  "low_price" REAL /* Lowest price of the stock on the given date */,
  "close_price" REAL /* Closing price of the stock */,
  "volume" INTEGER /* Volume of shares traded */,
  "adjusted_close" REAL /* Adjusted closing price to account for stock splits and dividends */,
  "dividend" REAL /* Dividend amount per share */,
  "split_coefficient" REAL /* Split coefficient to account for stock splits */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("price_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_stock_prices_symbol_id FOREIGN KEY ("symbol_id") REFERENCES stock_symbols ("symbol_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "stock_symbols" (
  "symbol_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each stock symbol */,
  "symbol" TEXT /* Stock symbol (e.g., MTD) */,
  "company_name" TEXT /* Name of the company associated with the symbol */,
  "exchange" TEXT /* Stock exchange where the symbol is traded */,
  "industry" TEXT /* Industry of the company */,
  "sector" TEXT /* Sector of the company */,
  "market_cap" REAL /* Market capitalization of the company */,
  "ipo_date" TEXT /* IPO date of the company */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("symbol_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "user_name" TEXT /* Full name of the user */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the user (e.g., analyst, trader, admin) */,
  "department" TEXT /* Department of the user */,
  "job_title" TEXT /* Job title of the user */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "access_logs" (
  "access_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each access event */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user accessing the data */,
  "symbol_id" INTEGER /* ID of the stock symbol being accessed */,
  "access_date" TEXT /* Date when the data was accessed */,
  "access_type" TEXT /* Type of access (e.g., view, download) */,
  "access_time" TEXT /* Time when the data was accessed */,
  "query_params" TEXT /* Query parameters used to access the data */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("access_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_access_logs_symbol_id FOREIGN KEY ("symbol_id") REFERENCES stock_symbols ("symbol_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_access_logs_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "trading_signals" (
  "signal_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each trading signal */,
  "symbol_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the stock symbol */,
  "date" TEXT /* Date when the signal was generated */,
  "signal_type" TEXT /* Type of trading signal (e.g., buy, sell, hold) */,
  "confidence_score" REAL /* Confidence score of the signal */,
  "signal_comment" TEXT /* Comment or description of the signal */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("signal_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_trading_signals_symbol_id FOREIGN KEY ("symbol_id") REFERENCES stock_symbols ("symbol_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "trading_strategies" (
  "strategy_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each trading strategy */,
  "strategy_name" TEXT /* Name of the trading strategy */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the trading strategy */,
  "parameters" TEXT /* Parameters used in the trading strategy */,
  "risk_level" TEXT /* Risk level of the strategy (e.g., high, medium, low) */,
  "profit_target" REAL /* Profit target of the strategy */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("strategy_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "strategy_signals" (
  "signal_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each strategy signal */,
  "strategy_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the trading strategy */,
  "symbol_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the stock symbol */,
  "date" TEXT /* Date when the signal was generated */,
  "signal_type" TEXT /* Type of trading signal (e.g., buy, sell, hold) */,
  "confidence_score" REAL /* Confidence score of the signal */,
  "signal_comment" TEXT /* Comment or description of the signal */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("signal_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_strategy_signals_symbol_id FOREIGN KEY ("symbol_id") REFERENCES stock_symbols ("symbol_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_strategy_signals_strategy_id FOREIGN KEY ("strategy_id") REFERENCES trading_strategies ("strategy_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "backtesting_results" (
  "result_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each backtesting result */,
  "strategy_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the trading strategy */,
  "symbol_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the stock symbol */,
  "start_date" TEXT /* Start date of the backtesting period */,
  "end_date" TEXT /* End date of the backtesting period */,
  "total_return" REAL /* Total return of the strategy during the backtesting period */,
  "max_drawdown" REAL /* Maximum drawdown of the strategy during the backtesting period */,
  "sharpe_ratio" REAL /* Sharpe ratio of the strategy during the backtesting period */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("result_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_backtesting_results_symbol_id FOREIGN KEY ("symbol_id") REFERENCES stock_symbols ("symbol_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_backtesting_results_strategy_id FOREIGN KEY ("strategy_id") REFERENCES trading_strategies ("strategy_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "risk_management" (
  "risk_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each risk management record */,
  "strategy_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the trading strategy */,
  "symbol_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the stock symbol */,
  "risk_level" TEXT /* Risk level of the strategy (e.g., high, medium, low) */,
  "stop_loss" REAL /* Stop loss price of the strategy */,
  "position_size" REAL /* Position size of the strategy */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("risk_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_risk_management_strategy_id FOREIGN KEY ("strategy_id") REFERENCES trading_strategies ("strategy_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_risk_management_symbol_id FOREIGN KEY ("symbol_id") REFERENCES stock_symbols ("symbol_id")
)
